title: An Act to Study the Role of Natural Gas in an Equitable Clean Energy Transition for Maine and to Establish a Commission to Study the Establishment of a Just and Equitable Transition for Maine's Workforce
last_house_action: 4/8/2025 - Committee on Energy, Utilities and Technology suggested and ordered printed. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on ENERGY, UTILITIES AND TECHNOLOGY . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 5/27/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
